_readme: STARTER MAP (ADR-0009). profile→skill curation for scripts/skill_overrides.py. selected = universal ∪ profiles[profile] ∪ extensions_added − extensions_removed; everything installed-but-unselected is set skillOverrides:'off' in the downstream .claude/settings.json. An 'extension' is a stack tag → skill list; an unknown tag is treated as a bare skill name, so extensions_added can also name a single skill directly. Editable data — refine against _project_specs/todos/focus-004-audit.md. Skills NOT in any list here (e.g. the remaining ADR-0008 removals not yet uninstalled: workspace, team-coordination) are off everywhere by default. (session-management, code-deduplication, cross-agent-delegation, agent-teams, ai-models, autonomous-testing, build-in-public, codex-review, gemini-review were uninstalled 2026-07-17.)
